productDisplayName: Fila Men Black & Red Picasso Sandals
description: Style Note These sandals are made with all of the expertise held by fila - a brand based in Italy's materials capital, Biella. They are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship - the synthetic upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. Wear these with your off-duty essentials. Product Details Black and red floaters, synthetic upper in an attractive design with forefoot, collar and ankle straps, complete with Velcro fasteners for a snug Fit, cushioned lining for greater comfort on the ankle strap and collar, appliqué d logo on the straps, cushioned footbed with branding pattern for all day comfort, TPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for durability, curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Material and Care Synthetic, TPR outsole Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
